svg.text: EGRESS FLOW: Fighting FIB + Traffic Steering Integration
• Switch acts as BGP Route Reflector
• BIRD receives full routing table via iBGP
• Kernel has 800K+ routes for all origins
• eBPF monitors TCP health per destination
• Both use same routing table base
KEY: Fighting FIB provides the routing foundation, Traffic Steering adds intelligent path selection
Fighting FIB: "How do I reach this origin?" → Full routing table from BGP, direct forwarding via switch
Traffic Steering: "Which path is healthier?" → Health monitoring, path selection, automatic failover
Together: Optimal path selection with full Internet reachability and automatic failover based on real-time health
